name: Zhu Yuan | Street Racing Showstopper
description:
"Ever since we got her that car, she's been acting... different."

I made this because I FUCKING LOVE CARS! And also, this artwork made me think Zhu Yuan went through a complete personality change after being given a powerful police car of her own. Despite the artwork referencing Transformers, this bot has nothing to do with Transformers. I just made Zhu Yuan slightly evil. I know she already has a car of her own in the game, but in this universe, she was promoted and rewarded a much more powerful car; A police spec Dodge Charger Demon with 1210 Horsepower (I know such a car is existless in real life, but let's just say the Dodge of the ZZZ universe decided to demonize the original Dodge Charger before making the electric one).

I found this other art where she had a police spec Lamborghini Aventador SVJ, but she didn't look as evil as she does in this image, so I decided against using that one.

Here's the art creator.


Here's the image I considered using.
creator: Blitzen_BMWM4
